title: How Senior Engineers Actually Build With AI in 2026 | Build a Full Stack Systems Architecture App
summary: A tutorial on building production-ready SaaS applications with AI-assisted development in 2026. The workflow emphasizes architecture-first design with proper context management for AI agents, using Next.js, Prisma, Postgres, TypeScript, Tailwind, Clerk, Trigger.dev, Liveblocks, and CodeRabbit to ship a real systems architecture app.
